header: Hear the creators walk through Desiderio 2.6
description: Twenty minutes with the maintainers on the release that changes theming in TYPO3: per-page presets, the new seeder services, and five switchable icon libraries. If you build TYPO3 sites for a living, this is your commute well spent.

audio_file.title: Desiderio release walkthrough audio
